Package nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.actions

Class SwingReportAction

java.lang.Object
javax.swing.AbstractAction
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.actions.SwingReportAction
All Implemented Interfaces:
ActionListener, Serializable, Cloneable, EventListener, Action
Direct Known Subclasses:
GenerateAccountActivityReportAction, GenerateBalanceSheetAction, GenerateCashFlowStatementAction, GenerateIncomeStatementAction, GenerateTrialBalanceAction
public abstract class SwingReportAction extends AbstractAction
Swing Action base class that generates Jasper reports using the ReportService. Subclasses specify the ReportService.ReportType they wish to produce and may further customise the ReportContext before generation.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Constructor Details

    • SwingReportAction

      protected SwingReportAction(ReportService reportService, ReportService.ReportType reportType, String reportDisplayName)
      Instantiates a new swing report action.
      Parameters:
      reportService - the report service
      reportType - the report type
      reportDisplayName - the report display name

  • Method Details

    • actionPerformed

      public void actionPerformed(ActionEvent event)
      Override @see java.awt.event.ActionListener#actionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent)

    • configureContext

      protected void configureContext(ReportContext context, Company company)
      Allows subclasses to add report-specific context information prior to report generation.
      Parameters:
      context - the context that will be supplied to ReportService
      company - the active company (may be null)

    • defaultOutputFormat

      protected String defaultOutputFormat()
      Default output format.
      Returns:
      the output format that should be used when exporting the report.

    • isCompanyOpen

      protected boolean isCompanyOpen()
      Determines whether a company is currently open. Subclasses may override to inject test data.
      Returns:
      true, if is company open

    • getCurrentCompany

      protected Company getCurrentCompany()
      Retrieves the active company. Subclasses may override to inject test data.
      Returns:
      the current company

    • handleNoCompanyOpen

      protected void handleNoCompanyOpen()
      Displays a warning when no company is currently open.

    • handleSuccess

      protected void handleSuccess(File output)
      Displays a success message once the report has been generated.
      Parameters:
      output - the output

    • handleError

      protected void handleError(Exception ex)
      Displays an error message when report generation fails.
      Parameters:
      ex - the ex

    • showDialog

      protected void showDialog(String message, int messageType)
      Shows a dialog if the environment supports Swing; otherwise logs the message. Subclasses may override to intercept the messaging for tests.
      Parameters:
      message - the message
      messageType - the message type

    • getReportService

      protected ReportService getReportService()
      Gets the report service.
      Returns:
      the backing ReportService.

    • getReportType

      protected ReportService.ReportType getReportType()
      Gets the report type.
      Returns:
      the report type generated by this action.

    • getReportDisplayName

      protected String getReportDisplayName()
      Gets the report display name.
      Returns:
      a human readable name for the generated report.
